name: @noctis/midnight-contracts
description: Noctis Protocol Midnight PSM contracts and simulation tests

scripts.compile: compact --version 2>&1 | grep -qE '^compact [0-9]' || { echo 'ERROR: `compact` does not resolve to the real Midnight Compact CLI.' >&2; echo 'On Windows, the native `compact` on PATH is system32\compact.exe (a file-compression tool), not the Compact compiler.' >&2; echo 'Run this via WSL, where the real CLI is installed (see midnight-tooling:install-cli), or fix PATH ordering so the real `compact` resolves first.' >&2; exit 1; } && for f in bonding_curve eligibility_gate treasury creator_escrow vesting lp_escrow cto_governance staking_pool; do compact compile --skip-zk "$f.compact" "compiled/$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test: npm run compile && npx vitest run
